key.name: border-thickness
key.description: Thickness of the border around always-on-top windows (in pixels)

key.name: use-accent-color
key.description: When enabled on GNOME 47+, the border uses the desktop accent colour. Falls back to the custom border colour on older GNOME versions or when this option is turned off.

key.name: border-color
key.description: Border color in hex format (#rrggbb). Used when "Use system accent color" is off or unavailable.

key.name: corner-radius
key.description: Corner radius of the border in pixels.
